title: Analytics - Login
scenario: Login and logout events are logged and tracked in the Poly Studio Mobile app with analytics including event count by country, gender, app version, and environment
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Attempt to log in with valid credentials.
Observe the app behavior after the login attempt.
Observe the app behavior after the logout attempt.
Navigate to the Analytics or Logs section (if available in the app).
Check the 'Graph for this event' section to see if login/logout events are plotted.
Check the 'Events in last 30 minutes' section to see if the login/logout event appears.
Check the 'Event count by Country' section to see if the event is attributed correctly.
Check the 'Event count by Gender' section to see if the event is attributed correctly.
Check the 'Events per session' section to see if the login/logout event increments the session count.
Check the 'App Version', 'App Build', and 'App Environment' fields to confirm they are populated correctly.
expected: Login and logout attempts (successful or not) are logged immediately. Event counts and all default elements (Graph, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App Build, App Environment) are updated and displayed correctly in real-time or near real-time.
